entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Demonology Warlock DPS in Burning Crusade
Leveling Rotation for Demonology Warlock DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Cast Curse of Agony if the target is expected to survive for 12 seconds or longer.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Demonology Warlock DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Cast Corruption if the target is expected to survive for 12 seconds or longer.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Demonology Warlock DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Cast Immolate if the target is expected to survive for 12 seconds or longer.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Demonology Warlock DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Channel Drain Life once all DoTs are up.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Demonology Warlock DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Drain Soul just as your target dies to proc Improved Drain Soul .

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Demonology Warlock DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Send in your Felguard to Cleave .

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Demonology Warlock DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Corruption and Curse of Agony on multiple targets while closing distance.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Demonology Warlock DPS in Burning Crusade

sections.heading: Leveling Rotation for Demonology Warlock DPS in Burning Crusade

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Demonology Warlock DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: Resource management is the most important aspect of Warlock leveling. Thanks to Life Tap , Warlocks have two resources to pull from to decrease downtime and thus maximize experience gain. To get full use out of Siphon Life and Drain Life , make sure you keep an eye on your health and mana, and Life Tap frequently to try to maintain both resources at close to 100%.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Demonology Warlock DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: If you use Dark Pact , you want to keep your pets' mana-using spells off auto-cast. This will allow you to manage your pet’s mana to ensure your demon will have enough for when you want to use Dark Pact.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Demonology Warlock DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: You can buy grimoires beforehand for the important spells for your pet of choice and keep them in your bags to use when leveling up. This allows you to avoid needing to return to a trainer when there aren't meaningful upgrades to your other spells.

sections.heading: Leveling Tips for Demonology Warlock DPS in TBC Classic
